turns.speaker: user
turns.text: can you help me do make an hypothetical financial breakdown of 1500 dollar for a my marketing strategy company which include partenership with influencers, event planning, social media promotion and advertesing for a company called KIVU LAVA CENTER which offers services in bakery, cosmetics and food services

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Sure, I can help you with a hypothetical financial breakdown of $1500 for your marketing strategy for KIVU LAVA CENTER. Here's an estimation:

1. Partnership with Influencers - $500
- Research and evaluation of potential influencers - $100
- Outreach and communication with influencers - $200
- Partnership and collaboration fees with influencers - $200

2. Event Planning - $450
- Research on event concept, target audience, and location - $100
- Planning and coordination of event - $200
- Promotion and advertising of the event - $150

3. Social Media Promotion - $300
- Creation of social media accounts - $50
- Content creation and posting - $100
- Management and monitoring of social media accounts - $100
- Boosting of posts and reaching wider audience - $50

4. Advertising - $250
- Design and creation of advertisements - $100
- Placement and promotion of advertisements - $150

Total: $1500

Note: This is a hypothetical estimation and actual costs may vary based on several factors like market rates, influencer fees, location, and other variables. It is important to conduct proper research and planning before making any investments in marketing strategies.

CONTRACT AGREEMENT

This Contract Agreement is signed with effect from Tuesday, 6 June 2023, BETWEEN:
[YASSIN TUSINGWIRE), a company [INDICATE TYPE OF COMPANY incorporated under the laws of [INDICATE CONSTITUENT ACT/REGULATING ACT], and (av du rond point n27) (hereinafter referred to as the "Client").
AND
(YOUR COMPANY NAME) (/'Company') a company [SPECIFY TYPE OF COMPANY] incorporated under the laws of [INDICATE THE CONSTITUENT LAW/GOVERNING ACT], and whose registered office is located at [YOUR FULL ADDRESS], (hereinafter referred to as the "Consultant").

Whereas the Consultant wishes to provide the Client with the services described below;
Whereas the Client, after due consideration, considers that the Consultant is qualified to carry out the said work and it is in the Client's own interests to do so.
In consideration of the foregoing, the parties are in agreement as follows:

1. SERVICES TO BE PROVIDED TO THE CLIENT

The Consultant shall provide the following services to the Client:
- Conducting a market analysis of the Client's industry and identifying target audiences
- Developing a comprehensive marketing strategy for the Client
- Creating marketing materials, such as brochures and social media posts, to promote the Client's brand
- Providing guidance on advertising and promotional opportunities
- Measuring the effectiveness of the marketing strategy and making adjustments as needed

2. TERMS OF PAYMENT AND INVOICING

2.1 Payment for Services
The Consultant will be paid as follows: The Consultant will provide marketing strategy services for a fee of $1500, payable in full upon acceptance of this proposal. The fee includes all services provided by the Consultant for the four-month engagement.

3. CANCELLATION AND TERMINATION

Either party may terminate this Contract upon written notice to the other party if the other party breaches any material term or condition of this Contract and fails to cure such breach within fifteen (15) days of receipt of written notice of such breach.

4. CONFIDENTIALITY

The Consultant will maintain the confidentiality of all information provided by the Client and will not disclose such information to any third party without the Client's prior written consent.

5. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

All intellectual property created during the engagement is the property of the Client. Any materials produced by the Consultant for use by the Client, including marketing materials, shall be owned by the Client and the Consultant agrees not to use such materials for any other purpose other than fulfilling their obligation under this agreement.

6. GOVERNING LAW AND JURISDICTION

This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of [insert governing law] and the parties agree to submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of [insert jurisdiction].

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this agreement as of the date first written above.
